title: Phase 3A: Auth flows - login, forgot password, NextAuth config, guards
description: Build complete auth flow: branded login page, forgot password flow, NextAuth configuration with JWT and session callbacks, auth guard hooks, and session provider wrapper.
steps: Create src/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx with branded login page
Create src/components/auth/login-form.tsx with email/password form using react-hook-form + Zod
Create src/app/(auth)/forgot-password/page.tsx with forgot password flow
Configure src/lib/auth/options.ts with JWT strategy, credentials provider, session callbacks
Create src/hooks/use-auth.ts with useAuth hook (session, user, loading state)
Create src/hooks/use-permissions.ts with usePermissions hook (can, canAny, canAll helpers)
Create src/app/middleware.ts for auth redirect (unauthenticated -> login)
